title: sdk: extend outputSchema to shell tasks and enforce in task:post
summary: Add SDK-enforced outputSchema validation for successful shell task result values so malformed shell JSON is rejected during task result posting, before result.json is written or EFFECT_RESOLVED is emitted.
acceptanceCriteria: Shell task definitions can declare an outputSchema, with absence or outputSchema: false preserving current behavior.
Validation is implemented in the shared SDK commit path, not only in the CLI task:post wrapper.
A successful shell task post whose value is missing a required field is rejected with structured validation_error details.
Rejected schema posts do not write result.json, append EFFECT_RESOLVED, update the task registry, rebuild state cache as resolved, or fire task.completed hooks.
A successful shell task post with a valid value commits as it does today.
Direct SDK callers, CLI task:post, MCP task_post, and testing harnesses all inherit the same commitEffectResult invariant.
Existing tasks without outputSchema and tasks with outputSchema: false continue to work as before.
Docs show shell outputSchema usage and task:post validation behavior.
Tests cover negative validation, positive validation, compatibility behavior, mutation safety, CLI surface behavior, and task-definition preservation.
nonGoals: Do not replace the existing lightweight JSON Schema validator with a new dependency unless a required acceptance criterion cannot be met.
Do not redesign task serialization or resultRef spill behavior beyond validating the in-memory value before serialization.
Do not change process outputSchema validation behavior.
Do not make outputSchema mandatory for all shell tasks.
Do not sweep every shared library shell helper into this implementation unless the change remains small; produce follow-up items for broad helper schema adoption.
Do not implement unrelated process runtime error classification from #573.

processLibraryResearch.requestedRootStatus: absent in this checkout during planning

plannedPhases.name: Reuse audit
plannedPhases.purpose: Run the repo-required plan reuse audit for outputSchema, task:post, schemaValidator, result commit, task serializer, CLI, MCP, and shared process helper surfaces.

plannedPhases.name: Issue context
plannedPhases.purpose: Read #572, every comment, labels, and confirm it is not a PR; extract acceptance criteria, non-goals, and triage refinements.

plannedPhases.name: Architecture map
plannedPhases.purpose: Trace task definitions from ctx.task through task.json, task:post value parsing, commitEffectResult, result serialization, EFFECT_RESOLVED, and replay consumption.

plannedPhases.name: Schema contract design
plannedPhases.purpose: Define the public shell outputSchema task contract, validation point, structured error payload, outputSchema: false compatibility, and shell failure normalization policy.

plannedPhases.name: Regression plan
plannedPhases.purpose: Add failing tests first for invalid shell values, valid shell values, compatibility, mutation safety, CLI behavior, and task-definition preservation.

plannedPhases.name: Implementation loop
plannedPhases.purpose: Implement the narrow SDK type, validation, CLI error propagation, and docs changes; iterate up to three attempts based on verification and review.

plannedPhases.name: Verification gate
plannedPhases.purpose: Run targeted tests, SDK build, SDK test suite, metadata verification, and diff hygiene checks with exact evidence.

plannedPhases.name: Implementation review
plannedPhases.purpose: Review shared commit-path enforcement, pre-mutation ordering, public API compatibility, and test coverage.

plannedPhases.name: Docs and library sweep
plannedPhases.purpose: Verify docs and examples, then scan shared shell helpers and produce follow-up schema adoption items where broad changes exceed issue scope.

plannedPhases.name: Final acceptance
plannedPhases.purpose: Confirm all issue requirements, non-goals, quality gates, changed files, and PR summary are ready.

breakpoints.when: The shell outputSchema contract has a genuine ambiguity, especially around CLI-normalized shell failure values or top-level versus nested schema placement.
Final acceptance finds unresolved compatibility risk or a verification failure that cannot be classified as unrelated.

qualityGates: A red test proves a shell task with outputSchema requiring checks rejects { verified: true } with validation_error details.
The rejection test proves no result.json exists and no EFFECT_RESOLVED event was appended.
A positive test proves { verified: true, checks: [] } commits successfully and replay consumers receive checks.
Compatibility tests prove no outputSchema and outputSchema: false preserve current behavior.
Task definition tests prove outputSchema is preserved in task.json for shell task definitions.
CLI task:post tests prove invalid --value and --value-inline posts exit non-zero and surface actionable validation output.
Shared commitEffectResult tests prove direct SDK/MCP/testing callers inherit the invariant.
Docs include a shell task outputSchema example and task:post failure semantics.
npm run test:sdk passes or unrelated pre-existing failures are documented with exact evidence.
Code review approves shared commit-path placement, mutation ordering, compatibility rules, and docs.

implementationNotes.preferredValidationLocation: packages/sdk/src/runtime/commitEffectResult.ts after effect lookup and invocation-key validation, before task.completed hooks and before serializeAndWriteTaskResult.
implementationNotes.schemaSelection: For shell task definitions, read tasks/<effectId>/task.json and use top-level outputSchema when it is an object. Treat false, undefined, and null as no schema.
implementationNotes.errorShape: Throw RunFailedError with structured data including reason: validation_error, effectId, taskId, kind, and errors from validateAgainstSchema.
implementationNotes.mutationSafety: Rejected posts must not write tasks/<effectId>/result.json, append EFFECT_RESOLVED, update globalTaskRegistry, or rebuild state cache as resolved.

publishPlan.implementationPrTitle: Enforce shell task outputSchema on posted results
implementationPrBodyMustMention: Shell outputSchema contract and outputSchema: false compatibility
